game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **SteamWorld Quest:** SteamWorld Quest is a turn-based role-playing game where players control a party of heroes engaging in combat using a customizable deck of "punch-cards." During combat, players are dealt a hand of cards from their collective party deck and strategically select 3-5 cards per turn to execute actions like attacking, defending, or casting spells against enemy units. Each hero contributes unique cards to the overall deck, and players can craft and upgrade their deck from a pool of over 100 distinct punch-cards, allowing for diverse combat strategies. Progression involves earning experience points (XP) from battles to level up heroes, increasing their stats and unlocking new card options, alongside collecting gold to purchase additional cards or equipment. The game features a linear adventure across various hand-drawn worlds, with the objective being to defeat all enemies in a given encounter to advance, while a loss occurs if all party members are incapacitated.
game_info.description: SteamWorld Quest: Card Combat is a turn-based card battle game where you control a party of three steampunk heroes fighting against waves of enemies. Build your deck from over 30 unique punch-cards, each with different attack, defense, and special abilities. Play 3 cards per turn to execute powerful combos. Defeat all enemies in each battle to progress through 5 challenging encounters. Level up your heroes, earn gold, and strategically upgrade your deck to overcome increasingly difficult foes. Victory comes from mastering card synergies and tactical planning!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and card choices
Space: Confirm card selection / Execute turn
Shift: View detailed card information
Z: Cancel last card selection
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic card playing mechanics and turn execution. Validates that the game can select random valid cards, execute turns, and progress through combat without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Randomly selects 3 cards from available hand each turn and executes the turn. Continues playing turns until either victory or defeat occurs.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game should progress through multiple turns without errors. Combat should resolve properly with health changes, card draws, and turn cycling. Test succeeds if game reaches GAME_OVER without crashes.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal strategy to win the game. Implements intelligent card selection prioritizing high-damage attacks, defensive plays when health is low, and efficient resource management.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritizes playing attack cards against enemies with lowest health to eliminate threats. Uses defend cards when hero health is below 50%. Focuses fire on one enemy at a time. Upgrades deck with strongest available cards after each battle.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeats all 5 encounters and reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. Heroes should remain alive through strategic card play and proper threat management. Test validates that win condition is achievable.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests deck building and upgrade mechanics. Validates that players can purchase new cards, upgrade existing cards, and that the deck composition affects combat effectiveness.
TEST_3.strategy_description: After each battle, purchases the most expensive available cards with earned gold. Tests different deck compositions by buying a mix of attack, defense, and special cards.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Deck should grow and become more powerful over time. Gold should decrease after purchases. New cards should appear in combat hands. Test succeeds if deck management works correctly through multiple encounters.
